arts.ttl: Diego Carlos' move to Fenerbahce in danger of falling through amid concerns over Jose Mourinho's future with the Turkish giants
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos' protracted move to Fenerbahce is stalling amid new concerns the deal is in danger of falling through.

arts.ttl: David Moyes warns Everton players he has not returned for a relegation battle
arts.sum: Moyes: ‘I’m not here to manage a team at the bottom’ Returning manager says players ‘had better turn up’ David Moyes told Everton’s players he has not returned to be immersed in a relegation battle but to regenerate the club for a second time. “I’ve got to make sure that when we walk out of Goodison and lock the door for the final time, we can all walk down to the new stadium in the right position,” the 61-year-old said as he was unveiled as Everton manager 23 years after first taking the job. Moyes met the Everton squad for the first time on Monday having signed a two-and-a-half-year contract to succeed Sean Dyche on Saturday. He admitted Everton’s new owners, The Friedkin Group, was stunned by how quickly matters unravelled with Dyche and has tasked Moyes not only with securing the club’s Premier League status but laying long-term foundations. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: David Moyes already had invite to return to Everton before taking manager's job
arts.sum: David Moyes has returned as Everton manager 11 years after departing Goodison Park - but he would have been back at the ground this season regardless

arts.ttl: David Moyes on Everton return: ‘It was too big an opportunity to turn down — I want to show I can go again’
arts.sum: Back at Goodison Park after nearly 12 years away, the Scottish manager explains to Richard Jolly why a second stint was so tempting and how he plans to steer Everton out of a relegation battle

arts.ttl: David Moyes opens up on potential 2019 Everton return and reveals all about Sean Dyche phone call
arts.sum: Returning Everton manager David Moyes spoke to the media on Tuesday afternoon

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Transfer News Today: Malen CONFIRMATION, Duran OFFER, Luiz SHOCK
arts.sum: Aston Villa Transfer News Today: Malen CONFIRMATION, Duran OFFER, Luiz SHOCK After some haggling, Aston Villa and Borussia Dortmund have finally struck a deal for Donyell Malen .

arts.ttl: Everton job too big an opportunity to turn down - Moyes
arts.sum: David Moyes says rejoining Everton was "too big an opportunity to turn down" after replacing Sean Dyche to become Toffees manager for the second time.

arts.ttl: Everton exclusive: Why David Moyes is '100% the best manager around' for the Toffees after Sean Dyche sacking
arts.sum: Former Everton winger Pat Nevin pays tribute to Sean Dyche following his dismissal last week and commends the Toffees for picking the perfect managerial replacement in David Moyes.

arts.ttl: 'Different beast Everton too big to turn down'
arts.sum: David Moyes says he will try to prove himself again after returning to Everton as manager 12 years after he departed to take over at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Moyes sure he can recreate past Everton glories
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes said on Monday he was confident in his ability to lead the Merseyside club to better days again, almost 12 years after his first spell in charge during which they had their only top-four finish of the last 37 years.
